name: macos-it-admin
description: Operator-side IT admin plugin: scriptable CRUD over vendor API tokens for Cloudflare, Turbopuffer, Neon, Parallel.ai, and Nimbleway. Implements the OSEC3 long-lived-minter pattern with macOS keychain bootstrap. Replaces browser-click token mint flows with deterministic CLI flows that never leak secret values into agent context.
